entry.title: New: CR 24-113 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 69, CD1 (2023), to: 1) authorize the Director of Finance to acquire real property or easements without Council approval if the conveyance is approved by the Mayor and is required by a grant agreement under Section 3.88.070, Maui County Code; and 2) require the provisions in grant agreements to land conservation organizations under Section 3.88.070, Maui County Code, to specify that Council approval be obtained by resolution.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
